_note: Lattice params from Mindat ID 4219. Piezoelectric from Jaffe et al. 1971.
curie_temperature_note: Vegard-law interpolation BaTiO3 (393K) + BaSnO3 (105K) at x=0.4
spontaneous_polarisation_note: BaTiO3 reference 0.26 C/m2; Sn reduces Ps
e33_note: Jaffe et al. (1971) BaTiO3 reference; BTS reduces e33
references: Jaffe et al. (1971) Piezoelectric Ceramics, Academic Press
Fischbach et al. (2019) J. Appl. Phys. 125, 114103
